title: Khuc Hao's Reforms
summary: The successor of the Khuc family with 'tolerant and simple' policies, bringing prosperity to the people.

slides.text: Continuing his father's work, Khuc Hao took power and began a 'fresh start' for the country. He wanted everyone to have a better life.
slides.imagePrompt: Khuc Hao standing with his advisors, pointing at a map of administrative reforms, hopeful and focused, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.text: He re-divided the country into smaller units for easier management and abolished many heavy taxes previously imposed by Northern invaders.
slides.imagePrompt: Old tax records being burned or put away, officials talking kindly to villagers, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.text: During this time, land was distributed to farmers. Everyone was excited to increase production, and the villages were filled with laughter.
slides.imagePrompt: Bountiful harvest scene, golden rice fields, happy villagers working together, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.text: Khuc Hao proved that when the Vietnamese manage their own country, we can make it strong, wealthy, and peaceful.
slides.imagePrompt: A panoramic view of a prosperous ancient Vietnamese village under the sun, birds flying, peaceful and thriving, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.question: Which words summarize Khuc Hao's ruling policies?
What was the purpose of Khuc Hao's administrative re-division?
options: To manage the country effectively and help the people
To prepare for conquering other countries
slides.answer: To manage the country effectively and help the people
